# s01 sample interaction

# Run:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "compute 17 * 23 by running an expression in bash"
#
# Expected shape (exact text varies — LLMs aren't deterministic, so this
# is a guide, not a golden file). Recording fixtures and replaying them
# offline is introduced in s04.

[turn 0] assistant: I'll use bash to compute 17 * 23.
[turn 0] -> bash map[command:echo $((17 * 23))]
[turn 0] <- 391
[turn 1] assistant: 17 * 23 = 391.
391
